EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} removed the file "{object.name}" from the device {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} opened the file "{object.name}" in read mode on the device {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} opened the file "{object.name}" in write mode on the device {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
